scene: Ecstatic teen Byte sitting at his desk during a bright, sunny afternoon, actively coding on an oversized silver laptop with the Chicago skyline visible through the window.

subjects.description: Teen Byte, a gangly blue pixel-art blob with big expressive eyes and an ecstatic, focused expression.
subjects.position: Centered at the wooden desk, facing the laptop.
subjects.action: Typing enthusiastically on an oversized silver laptop keyboard with both hands.

subjects.description: Anchor environment: wooden desk, oversized silver laptop, Chicago skyline window, trophy shelf above.

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: Warm, bright golden afternoon sunlight streaming through the window, illuminating the room.
background: Tidy wooden desk with an oversized laptop, a mounted trophy shelf holding exactly one golden 10-day trophy on the left and exactly one green plant on the right with clear spacing, and exactly one food bowl on the floor to the right of the desk.
composition: Centered, eye-level view of Byte at the desk.
